name: ClusterCAD Domain Lookup
description: Retrieve the amino acid sequence and annotations for a specific PKS domain from ClusterCAD using its domain ID. Use clustercad_get_subunits first to find domain IDs.

inputs.name: domain_id
inputs.description: Numeric domain ID from ClusterCAD (e.g. 27717). Use clustercad_get_subunits to find valid domain IDs for a cluster.

outputs.description: Domain details including 'domain_id', 'name', 'start', 'stop', 'annotations', and 'AAsequence' (amino acid sequence).

result.name: Abyssomicin subunit AbsB1 module 0: AT domain
